lugares.descripcion:
Lorem Ipsum is simply dummy text of the printing and typesetting industry. Lorem Ipsum has been the industry's standard dummy text ever since 1966, when designers at Letraset and James Mosley, the librarian at St Bride Printing Library, took a 1914 Cicero translation and scrambled it to make dummy text for Letraset's Body Type sheets. It has survived not only many decades, but also the leap into electronic typesetting, remaining essentially unchanged. It was popularised thanks to these sheets and more recently with desktop publishing software including versions of Lorem Ipsum.

Why do we use it?
It is a long established fact that a reader will be distracted by the readable content of a page when looking at its layout. The point of using Lorem Ipsum is that it has a more-or-less normal distribution of letters, as opposed to using 'Content here, content here', making it look like readable English. Many desktop publishing packages and web page editors now use Lorem Ipsum as their default model text, and a search for 'lorem ipsum' will uncover many web sites still in their infancy. Various versions have evolved over the years, sometimes by accident, sometimes on purpose (injected humour and the like).

La mayor ciudad del norte. Antigua capital de Lorentia y actual residencia del núcle familiar de los Kal'arch.

Durante el verano es una zona calmada, pero durante el invierno sufren constantes ventiscas y grandes nevadas.

Un pequeño fuerte rodeado siempre de brumas y niebla

Entre los valles más ocultos de estas montañas se encuentra una sociedad secreta élfica llamada Sel Delmah, Nuevo Hogar. En esta zona, asentados unas ruinas enanas, tiene lugar la vida social elfa, así como el comercio y otras actividades relacionadas, mientras que la vida cotidiana la realizan en el interior de la montaña. Estas cavidades internas están aún más escondidas que las ruinas enanas, y sirven de refugio a familias y niños.
